title: tricyrtis formosana var. stolonifera
intro: Tricyrtis formosana var. stolonifera, also known as the Formosan toad lily, is a variety of the Tricyrtis formosana plant, which is a type of flowering plant native to Taiwan and China. The Formosan toad lily is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and to promote digestion and relieve stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, sore throats, and skin conditions.
